original: A nobbly, wrinkled-looking fruit, striped dull blue and pale yellow. Its unappetizing appearance belays its pleasant, cool, pear-like flavor. It also seems to have a sedative effect, quelling your arousal at the expense of making your reactions slower.
context: <<POS:06379983>> "a dispassion fruit",e.tooltip='A nobbly, wrinkled-looking fruit, striped dull blue and pale'

original: You unpeel the blue-and-yellow fruit and gobble it up, the clear, cool juices coursing down your throat. That coolness seems to pervade your whole body after a few moments, washing over your baser instincts.
context: <<POS:06381065>> combatOutput("You unpeel the blue-and-yellow fruit and gobble it up, the clear, cool juices coursing down your throat. That coolness seems to pervade your whole body after a few moments, washing over your baser instincts.",null,e)

original: You’re left feeling as calm and still as a cloudless winter night.
context: <<POS:06381300>> combatAppend(" You’re left feeling as calm and still as a cloudless winter night.")

original: The side effect of your lowered libido has been extended.
context: <<POS:06381386>> combatAppend(" The side effect of your lowered libido has been extended.")
